mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, 0, 1, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id, username, password, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time from user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time from user where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update user set avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update user set nickname = #{nickname}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update user set password = #{password}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, username, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time from user where role = 0
and username like concat('%', #{queryDTO.username}, '%')
and nickname like concat('%', #{queryDTO.nickname}, '%')
and status = #{queryDTO.status}
order by id desc
